name: JKX Oil & Gas plc
summary: JKX Oil & Gas plc, through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, appraisal, development, and production of oil and gas reserves. The company holds interests in various properties located in Ukraine, Russia, and Hungary. It has total reserves of approximately 84.4 million barrels of oil equivalent. JKX Oil & Gas plc was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
